about: Per-page SEO copy for game+category pages, applied by:
Keys: game + category are the URL slugs (display-slug renames like
free-fire/diamonds resolve automatically). Only the fields present in an
entry are written, so a page can set just a title. seo_title is rendered
WITHOUT the '| GamesBazaar' suffix (the site adds it) - aim ~50 chars.
seo_description: aim 140-160 chars. seo_body: blank line = new paragraph,
Payment wording rule: never JazzCash-only - say 'JazzCash, Easypaisa or
bank transfer' or 'Pakistani payment methods', varied per page.
Batch 1 (2026-07-17): highest-search Pakistani pages - mobile top-ups,

pages.seo_title: Buy PUBG Mobile UC in Pakistan — Instant Top-Up
pages.seo_description: Top up PUBG Mobile UC in minutes and pay with JazzCash, Easypaisa or bank transfer. PKR prices, all popular UC packs, buyer protection on every order.
pages.seo_body:
## PUBG Mobile UC top-up at PKR prices

Buy UC for PUBG Mobile in Pakistani rupees and pay the way you already pay for everything else — JazzCash, Easypaisa, bank transfer and other Pakistani payment methods all work. Choose a UC pack, share your player ID, and the UC is delivered straight to your account, usually within minutes. A top-up only needs your player ID; you never hand over your password.

## Why buy UC on GamesBazaar

Every order is covered by buyer protection: your payment is held safely and only released to the seller once you confirm the UC arrived. Prices are in PKR with no hidden conversion charges, and support is one chat message away whenever you need help.

pages.seo_title: PUBG Mobile UC Vouchers & Gift Cards in Pakistan

pages.seo_body:
## UC voucher codes, delivered in minutes

A UC voucher is a code you redeem on your own account whenever you like, so you stay in full control. Pay in Pakistani rupees using JazzCash, Easypaisa, bank transfer or other local methods, receive the code in your order chat within minutes, and redeem it for UC when you're ready.

## A safe way to gift UC

Because vouchers are simple codes, they're perfect for gifting UC to a friend or topping up a second account. Your payment stays protected until you confirm the code works, so there's no risk of paying for a dead code.

pages.seo_body:

Pick a diamond pack, enter your Free Fire player ID, and the diamonds are topped up directly on your account — no password needed, usually within minutes. Pakistani server players are fully supported, and international servers are available too; just pick the region that matches your account.

## PKR prices, Pakistani payment methods

All prices are in Pakistani rupees and you can pay with JazzCash, Easypaisa, bank transfer or other local methods, so there are no dollar conversions or foreign payment headaches. Buyer protection holds your payment until you confirm the diamonds arrived, and memberships are available alongside regular diamond packs.

pages.seo_title: Buy Steam Wallet Gift Cards in Pakistan
pages.seo_description: Steam Wallet codes at PKR prices — pay with JazzCash, Easypaisa or bank transfer. Pakistan and dozens of other regions, delivered within minutes.
pages.seo_body:
## Steam Wallet codes for Pakistani gamers

Top up your Steam Wallet without a credit card: pay in Pakistani rupees — JazzCash, Easypaisa and bank transfer all work — and receive your wallet code within minutes. Codes are available for the Pakistan Steam store as well as dozens of other regions.

## Match the region to your account

Steam Wallet codes are region-locked, so always pick the region your Steam account actually uses — for most players here, that's the Pakistan store. Every purchase is covered by buyer protection: the seller is only paid after you confirm your code worked.

pages.seo_title: Buy Steam Games & Keys Cheap in Pakistan
pages.seo_description: Hundreds of Steam games at PKR prices — pay with JazzCash, Easypaisa or bank transfer and get your game as a key or Steam gift, usually within minutes.
pages.seo_body:
## Cheap Steam games, paid in rupees

This page collects every Steam game key on GamesBazaar in one place — use the search and filters to find your game. Prices are in Pakistani rupees, every popular Pakistani payment method is accepted, and most orders are delivered within minutes.

## How delivery works

Depending on the listing, you either get a key to redeem on Steam, receive the game as a Steam gift, or the seller activates it for you — in every case the game ends up in your own Steam library. Keys can be region-locked, so check the region noted on each listing. Your payment is protected until you confirm the game is in your library.

pages.seo_title: Buy PSN Gift Cards in Pakistan — All Regions
pages.seo_description: PSN wallet codes at PKR prices with JazzCash, Easypaisa or bank transfer. US, UK, UAE and many more regions, delivered in minutes — no credit card needed.
pages.seo_body:
## PSN cards without a credit card

There is no Pakistani PlayStation Store, so most players here run US, UK or UAE accounts — and this page has PSN wallet codes for those regions and many more. Pay in Pakistani rupees using JazzCash, Easypaisa, bank transfer or another local method, and your code arrives within minutes.

## Pick the right region

PSN codes only redeem on accounts from the same region, so match the card to your PSN account's region before buying. Every order is covered by buyer protection: your payment is released only after you confirm the code redeemed.
